title: Product Deletion Functionality - Functional Test Plan
overview: Functional testing of the product deletion feature for Assistive Partners on the Y4J platform. Covers delete option visibility, confirmation dialog, deletion rules for published/draft/pending products, soft/hard delete logic, user notifications, system feedback, error handling, media cleanup, accessibility, audit trail, and analytics impact.

testCases.title: Verify Delete Product Option Visibility
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, Product Management page is loaded, AP has at least one product
steps: Check for Delete Product option in action column
expectedResults: Delete Product option is visible for each owned product
Option is accessible in action column

testCases.title: Verify Delete Option Only for Owned Products
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, Product Management page is loaded, multiple APs have products in system
steps: Check delete option availability for each product
expectedResults: Delete option available only for AP's own products
No delete option for products owned by others
Authorization is enforced at UI level

testCases.title: Delete Product Under Review
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, Product Management page is loaded, AP has product with 'Under Review' status
expectedResults: Delete option is available for products under review
Product can be deleted before publishing

testCases.title: Display Confirmation Dialog
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, Product Management page is loaded, AP has at least one product
expectedResults: Warning message displays: 'This will permanently delete <Product Name>. This action cannot be undone.'
Product name is shown in message
Dialog is modal and blocks background interaction

testCases.title: Cancel Deletion
testCases.preconditions: Confirmation dialog is displayed, product is ready to be deleted
steps: Click Cancel button in confirmation dialog
expectedResults: User returns to Product Management page

testCases.title: Confirm Deletion
testCases.preconditions: Confirmation dialog is displayed, product is ready to be deleted
steps: Click 'Delete Product' button in confirmation dialog
expectedResults: Product removed from list (or marked as deleted)
testCases.postconditions: Product is deleted, user is on Product Management page

testCases.title: Verify Deleted Product Visible to AP with Status
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, published product has been deleted
expectedResults: Deleted product still visible to AP

testCases.title: Delete Draft Product Completely
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, Product Management page is loaded, AP has product in draft status
expectedResults: Product removed from AP's product list

testCases.title: Delete Pending Product Completely
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, Product Management page is loaded, AP has product in pending status
expectedResults: Product removed from AP's product list

testCases.title: Display Success Confirmation Message
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, product is ready to be deleted
expectedResults: Message states: "Product 'X' has been deleted successfully and is no longer visible in the catalog."

testCases.title: Verify Product Removed from Lists
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, product has been deleted
expectedResults: Product no longer in AP's active product list
Product not visible in PwD catalog
testCases.postconditions: Product is removed from all lists

testCases.title: Handle System Error During Deletion
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, product is ready to be deleted, system error is simulated
expectedResults: Message states: 'Unable to delete the product at this time. Please try again later or contact support.'

testCases.title: Block Unauthorized Deletion Attempts
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, product is owned by another AP
steps: Attempt to delete product owned by another AP
expectedResults: Error message: 'You do not have permission to delete this product.'

testCases.title: Verify Keyboard Accessibility
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, Product Management page is loaded
steps: Navigate to Delete button using keyboard (Tab key)
expectedResults: All buttons are reachable via keyboard

testCases.title: Verify Color Contrast and Focus States
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in, Product Management page is loaded
steps: Check color contrast using accessibility tool
